title: Expansion Strategy Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger expansion strategy foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Expansion Strategy Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Expansion Strategy Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good expansion strategy foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Expansion Strategy Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
